privileged_info_summary: The threat_model_mobile_banking task is a synthetic benchmark for testing diagram creation capabilities using draw.io. The task requires agents to create a STRIDE threat model for a hypothetical 'FinSecure Mobile Banking' system with 4 external entities (Mobile User, Admin User, Payment Processor, Credit Bureau), 6 processes (API Gateway, Authentication Service, Account Management, Transaction Engine, Notification Service, Fraud Detection), 5 data stores (Credentials DB, Balance DB, Transaction Log, Audit Log, Session Cache), 4 trust boundaries (Mobile Device, DMZ, Internal Services, External Third-Party), and 18 specific data flows. Agents must annotate 6 STRIDE threats (Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Information Disclosure, Denial of Service, Elevation of Privilege) and create a second page with a threat summary table. The diagram file is created at /home/ga/Diagrams/threat_model.drawio and must be exported as PDF to /home/ga/Diagrams/threat_model.pdf. All architectural requirements are detailed in a specification file at /home/ga/Desktop/mobile_banking_architecture.txt.
